case_number: Criminal Bail Application is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Appln No.S- 345 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of post arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of post-arrest bail 26-5-2025 Mr. Shafique Ahmed Laghari, Advocate for the applicant Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, DAG along with I.O Wajid Ali Darban -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After arguing at some length, learned counsel for the applicant submits that he would be satisfied and does not press the instant Criminal Bail Application, if the trial Court is directed to conclude the trial within the shortest period of time. This proposal has not been opposed by the learned DAG. In view of the above, the instant Criminal Bail Application is dismissed as not pressed, with a direction to the trial Court to conclude the trial within thirty days. No unnecessary adjournment shall be granted to any of the party. If the trial Court is of the view that the complainant party is avoiding the proceedings, it shall be at liberty to issue coercive process against them in accordance with law. In the event that the trial is not concluded within a period of thirty days, without any fault attributable to the applicant, the applicant shall be at liberty to file a fresh bail application, which shall be considered and decided strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Naveed Ali
